title: varlink: PullImage doesn't provide useful logs in case of an error
body:
When you observe the error message below, there is no clear indicator what went wrong.

Fedora rawhide, podman-0.5.2-2.gitfa4705c.fc29.x86_64.

```
In [20]: podman.PullImage("docker.io/library/fedora:28")
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
VarlinkError                              Traceback (most recent call last)
<ipython-input-20-4a382237df47> in <module>()
----> 1 podman.PullImage("docker.io/library/fedora:28")
        global podman.PullImage = <function ClientInterfaceHandler._add_method.<locals>._wrapped at 0x7feb34373510>

/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py in _wrapped(*args=('docker.io/library/fedora:28',), **kwargs={})
     72                 return self._call_more(method.name, *args, **kwargs)
     73             else:
---> 74                 return self._call(method.name, *args, **kwargs)
        global self._call = undefined
        global method.name = undefined
        args = ('docker.io/library/fedora:28',)
        kwargs = {}
     75
     76         if sys.version_info.major >= 3:

/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py in _call(self=<varlink.client.SimpleClientInterfaceHandler object>, method_name='PullImage', *args=('docker.io/library/fedora:28',), **kwargs={})
    119
    120         self._in_use = True
--> 121         (message, more) = self._next_varlink_message()
        message = undefined
        more = undefined
        self._next_varlink_message = <bound method ClientInterfaceHandler._next_varlink_message of <varlink.client.SimpleClientInterfaceHandler object at 0x7feb343b9ef0>>
    122         if more:
    123             self.close()

/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py in _next_varlink_message(self=<varlink.client.SimpleClientInterfaceHandler object>)
     94             self._in_use = False
     95             e = VarlinkError.new(message, self._namespaced)
---> 96             raise e
        e = VarlinkError({'parameters': {'reason': 'unable to pull docker.io/library/fedora:28'}, 'error': 'io.projectatomic.podman.ErrorOccurred'},)
     97         else:
     98             return message['parameters'], ('continues' in message) and message['continues']

VarlinkError: {'parameters': {'reason': 'unable to pull docker.io/library/fedora:28'}, 'error': 'io.projectatomic.podman.ErrorOccurred'}
```

```
In [17]: podman.PullImage("registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28")                                                                                                            
---------------------------------------------------------------------------                                                                                                  
VarlinkError                              Traceback (most recent call last)                                                                                                  
<ipython-input-17-57f2ca3cbb83> in <module>()                
----> 1 podman.PullImage("registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28")                                                                                                            
        global podman.PullImage = <function ClientInterfaceHandler._add_method.<locals>._wrapped at 0x7feb34373510>
                                                                                                                                                                            
/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py in _wrapped(*args=('registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28',), **kwargs={})
     72                 return self._call_more(method.name, *args, **kwargs)
     73             else:                                                                                                                                                   
---> 74                 return self._call(method.name, *args, **kwargs)
        global self._call = undefined                                                                                                                                       
        global method.name = undefined               
        args = ('registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28',)
        kwargs = {}
     75                                        
     76         if sys.version_info.major >= 3:
                                                                                                                                                                             
/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py in _call(self=<varlink.client.SimpleClientInterfaceHandler object>, method_name='PullImage', *args=('registry.fedoraproje$
t.org/fedora:28',), **kwargs={})
    119                            
    120         self._in_use = True                           
--> 121         (message, more) = self._next_varlink_message()                                                                                                              
        message = undefined
        more = undefined                                                                                                                                                    
        self._next_varlink_message = <bound method ClientInterfaceHandler._next_varlink_message of <varlink.client.SimpleClientInterfaceHandler object at 0x7feb343b9ef0>>
    122         if more:        
    123             self.close()
                                                                                                                                                                            
/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py in _next_varlink_message(self=<varlink.client.SimpleClientInterfaceHandler object>)                                      
     94             self._in_use = False                           
     95             e = VarlinkError.new(message, self._namespaced)
---> 96             raise e                                                                                                                                                 
        e = VarlinkError({'parameters': {'reason': 'unable to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28'}, 'error': 'io.projectatomic.podman.ErrorOccurred'},)              
     97         else:                                                                                                                                                       
     98             return message['parameters'], ('continues' in message) and message['continues']
                                                                                                                                                                            
VarlinkError: {'parameters': {'reason': 'unable to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28'}, 'error': 'io.projectatomic.podman.ErrorOccurred'} 
```

comments.body: Just had an IRC discussion with @baude and the issue was that I was still having the old config. After getting the new one, this works correctly now.
We debated some more and concluded that present situation is okay. If you are running into issues like this, you should reproduce with CLI interface which provides full logging.
